overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding his horse Roach through a scenic rural landscape. The journey transitions from open wheat fields and countryside paths into a quaint medieval village with stone walls and thatched-roof cottages, before exiting back into wooded terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside wheat fields with stone wall boundaries

events.description: crossing a small wooden bridge over a narrow stream

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding Roach at a steady canter along a dirt path between wheat fields and stone walls

entered.detail: golden wheat crops extending to the horizon on the right side of the path
low stone walls lining the dirt path
individual deciduous trees dotting the left side of the landscape
calm body of water visible in the distance beyond the wheat fields
simple wooden plank bridge crossing a narrow stream

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day in the countryside, with Geralt riding along a dirt path bordered by stone walls and golden wheat fields. The camera follows from behind as they approach and cross a small wooden bridge over a stream, with a distant lake visible to the right and forested hills ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts transitioning from farmland to settlement

events.description: first thatched-roof village buildings become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the landscape transitions from open fields to village outskirts with denser vegetation

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fences replacing stone walls on the left side
stacked hay bales near the path edge
cluster of medieval-style buildings with thatched roofs visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The path continues through denser vegetation and wooden fences as the village comes into view ahead. The wheat fields recede into the distance while haystacks and rustic fencing line the route, signaling the approach to the settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village center with thatched cottages and wooden gates

events.description: passing through the wooden village gate structure into the settlement center

agents.ego_description: riding through the village center at a slower pace, navigating between cottages and villagers

notable_agents.action: villager in simple clothing standing near a wooden fence watching the rider
villager in red clothing standing near the stone wall by the gate

entered.detail: traditional medieval houses with straw thatched roofs and wooden frames
large wooden beam gate structure marking the village entrance
tall flowering plants with red and white blooms along the stone walls
higher stone walls surrounding the village properties

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the village proper, riding past thatched-roof cottages where villagers stand and observe. The path narrows between stone walls and wooden structures, leading to a prominent wooden gate that marks the village center. Flowering bushes add color to the rustic stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with stream crossing exiting the village

events.description: exiting the village through the rear gate into dense forested area
crossing a stone bridge over a wider stream or small river

agents.ego_description: exiting the village and accelerating along a shaded forest path, crossing a stone bridge over water

notable_agents.action: white chicken or goose standing near the path edge

entered.detail: solid stone construction bridge with low walls crossing over water
clear water flowing beneath the stone bridge
tall mature trees forming a dense canopy over the path
wooden gate structure marking the exit from the village

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village through a wooden gate, the scene transitions into a densely wooded area with tall trees casting dappled shadows. The path leads to a sturdy stone bridge crossing a stream, where a white chicken stands near the approach. The journey continues into the forest beyond the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the bright, open expanse of the countryside into a rustic medieval village and finally into a shaded forest. It begins with Geralt riding along a dirt path bordered by golden wheat fields and stone walls, crossing a small wooden bridge with a distant lake and forested hills on the horizon. As the wheat fields recede, the path winds through denser vegetation and rustic fencing, signaling the approach to a settlement. The scene then shifts into the village proper, moving past thatched-roof cottages and flowering bushes before passing through a prominent wooden gate. Finally, the camera follows the rider out of the village and into a densely wooded area of dappled shadows, crossing a sturdy stone bridge where a white chicken stands by the water.
